Holder.title: Holder references each override type to expose field-site rendering.

Priority.description: does it collect the consts below?
Priority.title: Priority is an enum declared with the BARE swagger:enum (no name arg) (F4b):

RawID.title: RawID is a byte-array type overridden to string, with swagger:model (F2).

Status.description:
Status is an enum type (named swagger:enum) with swagger:model (F4): values
inline on referencing fields, or a $ref to an enum definition?
Status.x-go-enum-desc:
active StatusActive is active.
closed StatusClosed is closed.

UUID.description:
UUID is a string-format type carrying BOTH swagger:strfmt and swagger:model
(F1): does it publish a {type:string,format:uuid} definition that fields
$ref, or inline + an orphan definition?
